TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pey-tow unsing ŚĆóśäēśļęś≥Č Pey-tow unsing tini i Taywan Taypak Pey-tow, u liwliw tabaki adidi' Kwang-I atu sya-I tusa ku kamu. Kwang-i u Pey-tow unsing, piazih tu Taywan saamisan a Sa-maw-san, Ta-tun-san-cyun, Ci-sin-san-huw-san-yen-cen-cyen, cin-san twan-cen a lala', duduc tu ancuh diheb a sauwac liwasak tu unsing, pasu akutiay a unsing, ancuh diheb unsing, tin-Py-tow unsing, Swan-cung sauwac a unsing, "Sin-I a zazan unsinng atu Lung-bungu nsing hatini. . sa-iay Pay-tu a unsing, nemnem a nanum iza ku cin-kwang -cyenay sasa akuti'ay diheb unsing, pay-kwang-cyen a angcuh diheb a unsing atu tiniay I Tin-Pay-tow, Swang-cung-si nuamisan atu nutimilan ancuhay a sauwac pabaw labu nu dihebay a tye-kwang-cyen. Pey-tow unsing lalangawan a likis ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šļļśĖá 1894 a mihcaan tu "cin-kwang-su 20 a mihcaan" saayaway tini I Pey-tow unsing patizeng tu unsing kalipahakan nu Te-kow ancuh misiwbayay a tademaw ci A-li "Ouely" tucila a demiad "1895 a mihcaan" 10 a bulad 10 a demiad, Lipun ci Cwa-tyen-siw-sung kayngung saw-cyang atu ci Zen-li-ce Paypak kuwan a su-ci-kwan, tayza i Pye-tu miazih tu unsing. i 1960 a mihcaan katukuh 1970 a mihcaan "kahulaman 50-60 a mihcaan", unsing a pilabinan yadah ku nipatizeng, piasip itawya katukah 70 kayadah a bacal nu misiwbayay tu unsing pilabinan, saca, i 1975 a mihcaan zikuzay 20 a mihcaan, mikawaway tu unsing a pilabinan makelul tu, macapi tu 50 tu aluma'an ku pilabinan a unsing kakilukilul sa masatezep misiwbay. Śú®1960 ), . tuyni a mihcaan, tusa tu dada' ku baluhayay unsing a pilabinan, hakay zayhan u "pacabayay a tatayna" likecay mapalasawad tu, caay kakapah ki nipisiwbay, caay kataneng ku nipatizeng tu kapulungan, atu lalangatan akasahini malakiit tu ku nipatades tu unsing. 1995 a mihcaan Pe-tow adidi'ay a picudadan sayda atu micudaday palekal tu Pey-tosw unsing kapulungan a lalililuc, sazikuzay Pey-tow tiniay nu saayaway a kow-tay ci Si-yang-min papising ci secangan ci Cen-suy-pyen a miawza maleku ku nipauzip. . 1998 a mihcaan, naye-cin-pu Pye-toway a kapulungan a pililucan pala u tulu lekal nu sumamaday a nazipaan, ci Si-yang-min atu muenengay a tademaw mapulung micuzuh amisakapah pala Pye-tow unsing puw-u-kwang han. caay ku Pey-tow unsing kapulungan a lalilucan, ci Si-yang-min misulimet, patahkal tu nigingkiwan musakamu Pye-tow pu-ci-s, Pye-tow caw-san pinanaman nu aydan, Pye-tow putung-min-wang-s, Pye-tow Taywan giku nu malumanan a pilaminan, ayaw pisebengan nu Lipun Mau-padekuan Pye-tow a kababenis a padekuan, Pye-tow sulu nu tipus, Pye-tow a pilabinan, Pye-tow pipazengan tu nu sumamaday a tuud, ciwlu Pye-towkiwkay,Caw-san pilabinan malaheci mala u sakatulu lekad ku nu sumamaday a nazipaan. anuayaw a mihcaan, papiidangay i 1999 micidekay u nilaculan ÁČĻśģäÁĒĘś•≠ i Taywan pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday, Pye-tow unsing iza ku "pacabayay anu tatayna" a likec, midangay a labang patucek miawza tu palilucay a tatayna, sisa itauyaay Pye-tow a unsing mala u singanganay tu a pabalakasan a kitizaan, lalid katukuh kahulaman a ziday. i puenengan a hitay nu Amelika hawsas, sangaleb hina iza ku hitay nu Amelika midang mikilim tu pacupiyaway, 19154 a mihcaan 4 abulad 30 a demiad, Pye-toway patizeng tu "pacabayay mabi a pilabinan a sakapu", u Pye-toway mala u tatungusay tu nu hulic a piidangan. . 1967 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 22 a demiad, Amelika "ziday sinbun" mala angangan nu "Pye-tow dihku damsay niyazu'" mikaysiwaw tu Pye-tow unnsing, win-cung sinbun mitupin tu cacay Ameylika a hitay atu tusa pacabayay a tatayna mapulung mililuc a sassing. nangnang sa ku pacupiyaway, maseluc ku wayway nu kanatal, "pacabayay a tatayna" lekec 1979 a mihcaan mapalasawad tu nu cen-bu. ayzaay a Pye-tow unsing maniyul tu u papiidang sanay tu, hanupiidanga hantu, malawpes tu pacupiyaway. kalamkamay a pakatukuh ťôźśôāŚįąťÄĀ i mikawaway tu pacabayay a tatayna u madangdangay pikuwanan nu kaLipuna a ziday, acaluway ku pacabayay a tatayna malalacal tu payunsing a pilabinan, amitupin aizaw ku "kalamkamay a pakatukuh" uyni micidekay miala patayza a kawaw. saayawan micukaymas tu sakacawan sa u lumeni'ay a kazizanng atu tuluay bihel a kazizeng, katukuh 1950 a mihcaan haymaw satu utubay tu ku sapatayza miala. amicumud tu kalamkamay a pakatukuh a kawaw, kanca amicumud tu saput a kazizeng, pabeli tu naculilan a kalisiw, mizawis tu nipasisil, u labang a miduduc tu teked nizubayan a akazizang patayza amiala a kawaw. caay ku mialay patayzaan yu pacabayay dada', kalamkamay a pakatukuh a mitupin tu Pey-tow tizaay nu muenengnay a tademaw tasasa nu buyu', mipatadu micakay tu sakauzip a tuud atu patanu tu labang pzazan tu pasaydaan. 1979 a mihcaan cin-bu palasawaden tu ku pacupiyaway zikuz, kalamkamay a pakatukuh malilid tu ku mahiniay a kawaw. katukuh 1999 a mihcaan. Yakuba patizeng tu mililiway kaput, uyza u luyaluy kalamkamay a pakatukuh kaput a kazizang kaput a tademaw mala u an-cyen misebengay mililiway a kawaw, nika zikaz ayza muliyaw ku tekeday patayza, caay ku mitupin patayza tu binawlan dada', kapah henay amipatadu pasata, caculculan‚Ä¶hatini, katukuh ayza mahiza tu ku Pey-toway a tademaw manamuh tabakiay saculilan. nakasi ťā£Ść°Ť•Ņ saayaway Pey-tow unsing nu kikawaway sakay kalipahakan Lipun atu Taywan a labang, pasazuma tulu ku maci zazanay paazih atu timulay a dadiw. 1925 a mihcaan, kilul tu tu nu lazuw a ziday, nuuzip a nipabaluhayan dengdeng a dadiw mala u angangan u sakalipahak. "nakasi" nu Lipun aimi, u milikiday muculil mudadiway a kawaw, lalekalan nu nakasi sa Taywan Pey-tow, itawyay katuud ku unsing pilabinan katud t uku sakaput a nakasi, hamin a kitizaan u unsing nakasi kaput katukuh tu lasubu kakatuud ku sakaput. caay ku dadiw dada' tawya dengdengay ku anisangaan tu dadi, iza ku maka Lipunay a dadiw liyawin aca pacumun tu nisulitan. Sadadiwan izaw ku imaciay a zaza paazih, pasumad han tu nu Amelikaay a halumika, gita a sadadiwan, sazikuza tu sa u ulugan. minakasiay a tademaw kanca a matineng tu lasubu anca malebut ku dadiw, uyni a dadiw pasu Amelika a dadiw, Lipun, Hulam, Layak hatini maydih ku labang tu dadiw hawsa, i pina a bititan amakilim kuyni a sadadiwan kya malingatu mudadiw. 1979 a mihcaan nazikuzan, kilul unsing a siwbay malawpes tu u labang paniyul tu kalaok, uyni nakasi a kawaw namakay Pey-tow tahkal tayza i cuwacuwa nu Taywan a kakitizaan malahad. 1979 OK, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == p…ô-tow unsiŇč **** p…ô-tow unsiŇč tini i tajwan tajpak p…ô-tow, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tabaki adidi Ē~ ° kwaŇč-i atu sja-i tusa ku kamu. kwaŇč-i u p…ô-tow unsiŇč, piazińß tu tajwan saamisan a sa-maw-san, ta-tun-san- ¶jun, ¶i-sin-san-ńßuw-san-j…ôn- ¶…ôn- ¶j…ôn, ¶in-san twan- ¶…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, dudu ¶ tu an ¶uńß dińß…ôb a sauwa ¶ r~…ĺiwasak tu unsiŇč, pasu akutiaj a unsiŇč, tatajna" r~…ĺik…ô ¶aj mapar~…ĺasawad tu, ¶aaj kakapańß ki nipisiwbaj, ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan, atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčatan akasańßini mar~…ĺakiit tu ku nipatad…ôs tu unsiŇč. **** a nazipaan, ¶i si-jaŇč-min atu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw mapur~…ĺuŇč mi ¶uzuńß amisakapańß par~…ĺa pj…ô-tow unsiŇč puw-u-kwaŇč ńßan. ¶aaj ku p…ô-tow unsiŇč kapur~…ĺuŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, ¶i si-jaŇč-min misur~…ĺim…ôt, patańßkar~…ĺ tu nigiŇčkiwan musakamu pj…ô-tow pu- ¶i-s, pj…ô-tow ¶aw-san pinanaman nu ajdan, pj…ô-tow putuŇč-min-waŇč-s, pj…ô-tow tajwan giku nu mar~…ĺumanan a pir~…ĺaminan, ajaw pis…ôb…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺipun mau-pad…ôkuan pj…ô-tow a kabab…ônis a pad…ôkuan, pj…ô-tow sur~…ĺu nu tipus, pj…ô-tow a pir~…ĺabinan, pj…ô-tow pipaz…ôŇčan tu nu sumamadaj a tuud, ¶iwr~…ĺu pj…ô-towkiwkaj, siŇčaŇčanaj tu a pabar~…ĺakasan a kitizaan, r~…ĺar~…ĺid katukuńß kańßur~…ĺaman a zidaj. i pu…ôn…ôŇčan a ńßitaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika ńßawsas, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ńßina iza ku ńßitaj nu am…ôr~…ĺika midaŇč mikir~…ĺim tu pa ¶upijawaj, ***** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, pj…ô-towaj patiz…ôŇč tu "pa ¶abajaj mabi a pir~…ĺabinan a sakapu", u pj…ô-towaj mar~…ĺa u tatuŇčusaj tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a piidaŇčan. . **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, am…ôr~…ĺika "zidaj sinbun" mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu "pj…ô-tow dińßku damsaj nijazu Ē~ °" mikajsiwaw tu pj…ô-tow unnsiŇč, win- ¶uŇč sinbun mitupin tu ¶a ¶aj am…ôr~…ĺika a ńßitaj atu tusa pa ¶abajaj a tatajna mapur~…ĺuŇč mir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶ a sassiŇč. naŇčnaŇč sa ku pa ¶upijawaj, mas…ôr~…ĺu ¶ ku wajwaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, "pa ¶abajaj a tatajna" r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ **** a mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺasawad tu nu ¶…ôn-bu. ajzaaj a pj…ô-tow unsiŇč manijur~…ĺ tu u papiidaŇč sanaj tu, ńßanupiidaŇča ńßantu, mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu pa ¶upijawaj. kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß **** i mikawawaj tu pa ¶abajaj a tatajna u madaŇčdaŇčaj pikuwanan nu kar~…ĺipuna a zidaj, a ¶ar~…ĺuwaj ku pa ¶abajaj a tatajna mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ tu pajunsiŇč a pir~…ĺabinan, amitupin aizaw ku "kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß" ujni mi ¶id…ôkaj miar~…ĺa patajza a kawaw. saajawan mi ¶ukajmas tu saka ¶awan sa u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a kazizanŇč atu tur~…ĺuaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ńßajmaw satu utubaj tu ku sapatajza miar~…ĺa. ami ¶umud tu kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß a kawaw, kan ¶a ami ¶umud tu saput a kaziz…ôŇč, pab…ôr~…ĺi tu na ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a kar~…ĺisiw, mizawis tu nipasisir~…ĺ, u r~…ĺabaŇč a midudu ¶ tu t…ôk…ôd nizubajan a akazizaŇč patajza amiar~…ĺa a kawaw. ¶aaj ku miar~…ĺaj patajzaan ju pa ¶abajaj dada Ē~ °, kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß a mitupin tu p…ô-tow tizaaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčnaj a tad…ômaw tasasa nu buju Ē~ °, mipatadu mi ¶akaj tu sakauzip a tuud atu patanu tu r~…ĺabaŇč pzazan tu pasajdaan. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶in-bu par~…ĺasawad…ôn tu ku pa ¶upijawaj zikuz, kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß mar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu ku mańßiniaj a kawaw. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan. jakuba patiz…ôŇč tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺiwaj kaput, ujza u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj kar~…ĺamkamaj a pakatukuńß kaput a kazizaŇč kaput a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa u an- ¶j…ôn mis…ôb…ôŇčaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺiwaj a kawaw, nika zikaz ajza mur~…ĺijaw ku t…ôk…ôdaj patajza, ¶aaj ku mitupin patajza tu binawr~…ĺan dada Ē~ °, kapańß ńß…ônaj amipatadu pasata, ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan*ńßatini, katukuńß ajza mańßiza tu ku p…ô-towaj a tad…ômaw manamuńß tabakiaj sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. nakasi *** saajawaj p…ô-tow unsiŇč nu kikawawaj sakaj kar~…ĺipańßakan r~…ĺipun atu tajwan a r~…ĺabaŇč, pasazuma tur~…ĺu ku ma ¶i zazanaj paazińß atu timur~…ĺaj a dadiw. **** a mińß ¶aan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tu nu r~…ĺazuw a zidaj, nuuzip a nipabar~…ĺuńßajan d…ôŇčd…ôŇč a dadiw mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan u sakar~…ĺipańßak. "nakasi" nu r~…ĺipun aimi, u mir~…ĺikidaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mudadiwaj a kawaw, r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu nakasi sa tajwan p…ô-tow, itawjaj katuud ku unsiŇč pir~…ĺabinan katud t uku sakaput a nakasi, ńßamin a kitizaan u unsiŇč nakasi kaput katukuńß tu r~…ĺasubu kakatuud ku sakaput. ¶aaj ku dadiw dada Ē~ ° tawja d…ôŇčd…ôŇčaj ku anisaŇčaan tu dadi, iza ku maka r~…ĺipunaj a dadiw r~…ĺijawin a ¶a pa ¶umun tu nisur~…ĺitan. sadadiwan izaw ku ima ¶iaj a zaza paazińß, pasumad ńßan tu nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a ńßar~…ĺumika, gita a sadadiwan, sazikuza tu sa u ur~…ĺugan. minakasiaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a a matin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺasubu an ¶a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku dadiw, ujni a dadiw pasu am…ôr~…ĺika a dadiw, r~…ĺipun, ńßur~…ĺam, r~…ĺajak ńßatini majdińß ku r~…ĺabaŇč tu dadiw ńßawsa, i pina a bititan amakir~…ĺim kujni a sadadiwan kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu mudadiw. **** a mińß ¶aan nazikuzan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ unsiŇč a siwbaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu u r~…ĺabaŇč panijur~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺaok, ujni nakasi a kawaw namakaj p…ô-tow tańßkar~…ĺ tajza i ¶uwa ¶uwa nu tajwan a kakitizaan mar~…ĺańßad. **** ok, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pey-tow unsing ŚĆóśäēśļęś≥Č Pey-tow unsing tini i Taywan Taypak Pey-tow, u liwliw tabaki adidi' Kwang-I atu sya-I tusa ku kamu. Kwang-i u Pey-tow unsing, piazih tu Taywan saamisan a Sa-maw-san, Ta-tun-san-cyun, Ci-sin-san-huw-san-yen-cen-cyen, cin-san twan-cen a lala', duduc tu ancuh diheb a sauwac liwasak tu unsing, pasu akutiay a unsing, ancuh diheb unsing, tin-Py-tow unsing, Swan-cung sauwac a unsing, "Sin-I a zazan unsinng atu Lung-bungu nsing hatini. . sa-iay Pay-tu a unsing, nemnem a nanum iza ku cin-kwang -cyenay sasa akuti'ay diheb unsing, pay-kwang-cyen a angcuh diheb a unsing atu tiniay I Tin-Pay-tow, Swang-cung-si nuamisan atu nutimilan ancuhay a sauwac pabaw labu nu dihebay a tye-kwang-cyen. Pey-tow unsing lalangawan a likis ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šļļśĖá 1894 a mihcaan tu "cin-kwang-su 20 a mihcaan" saayaway tini I Pey-tow unsing patizeng tu unsing kalipahakan nu Te-kow ancuh misiwbayay a tademaw ci A-li "Ouely" tucila a demiad "1895 a mihcaan" 10 a bulad 10 a demiad, Lipun ci Cwa-tyen-siw-sung kayngung saw-cyang atu ci Zen-li-ce Paypak kuwan a su-ci-kwan, tayza i Pye-tu miazih tu unsing. i 1960 a mihcaan katukuh 1970 a mihcaan "kahulaman 50-60 a mihcaan", unsing a pilabinan yadah ku nipatizeng, piasip itawya katukah 70 kayadah a bacal nu misiwbayay tu unsing pilabinan, saca, i 1975 a mihcaan zikuzay 20 a mihcaan, mikawaway tu unsing a pilabinan makelul tu, macapi tu 50 tu aluma'an ku pilabinan a unsing kakilukilul sa masatezep misiwbay. Śú®1960 ), . tuyni a mihcaan, tusa tu dada' ku baluhayay unsing a pilabinan, hakay zayhan u "pacabayay a tatayna" likecay mapalasawad tu, caay kakapah ki nipisiwbay, caay kataneng ku nipatizeng tu kapulungan, atu lalangatan akasahini malakiit tu ku nipatades tu unsing. 1995 a mihcaan Pe-tow adidi'ay a picudadan sayda atu micudaday palekal tu Pey-tosw unsing kapulungan a lalililuc, sazikuzay Pey-tow tiniay nu saayaway a kow-tay ci Si-yang-min papising ci secangan ci Cen-suy-pyen a miawza maleku ku nipauzip. . 1998 a mihcaan, naye-cin-pu Pye-toway a kapulungan a pililucan pala u tulu lekal nu sumamaday a nazipaan, ci Si-yang-min atu muenengay a tademaw mapulung micuzuh amisakapah pala Pye-tow unsing puw-u-kwang han. caay ku Pey-tow unsing kapulungan a lalilucan, ci Si-yang-min misulimet, patahkal tu nigingkiwan musakamu Pye-tow pu-ci-s, Pye-tow caw-san pinanaman nu aydan, Pye-tow putung-min-wang-s, Pye-tow Taywan giku nu malumanan a pilaminan, ayaw pisebengan nu Lipun Mau-padekuan Pye-tow a kababenis a padekuan, Pye-tow sulu nu tipus, Pye-tow a pilabinan, Pye-tow pipazengan tu nu sumamaday a tuud, ciwlu Pye-towkiwkay,Caw-san pilabinan malaheci mala u sakatulu lekad ku nu sumamaday a nazipaan. anuayaw a mihcaan, papiidangay i 1999 micidekay u nilaculan ÁČĻśģäÁĒĘś•≠ i Taywan pikuwanay nu Lipun a ziday, Pye-tow unsing iza ku "pacabayay anu tatayna" a likec, midangay a labang patucek miawza tu palilucay a tatayna, sisa itauyaay Pye-tow a unsing mala u singanganay tu a pabalakasan a kitizaan, lalid katukuh kahulaman a ziday. i puenengan a hitay nu Amelika hawsas, sangaleb hina iza ku hitay nu Amelika midang mikilim tu pacupiyaway, 19154 a mihcaan 4 abulad 30 a demiad, Pye-toway patizeng tu "pacabayay mabi a pilabinan a sakapu", u Pye-toway mala u tatungusay tu nu hulic a piidangan. . 1967 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 22 a demiad, Amelika "ziday sinbun" mala angangan nu "Pye-tow dihku damsay niyazu'" mikaysiwaw tu Pye-tow unnsing, win-cung sinbun mitupin tu cacay Ameylika a hitay atu tusa pacabayay a tatayna mapulung mililuc a sassing. nangnang sa ku pacupiyaway, maseluc ku wayway nu kanatal, "pacabayay a tatayna" lekec 1979 a mihcaan mapalasawad tu nu cen-bu. ayzaay a Pye-tow unsing maniyul tu u papiidang sanay tu, hanupiidanga hantu, malawpes tu pacupiyaway. kalamkamay a pakatukuh ťôźśôāŚįąťÄĀ i mikawaway tu pacabayay a tatayna u madangdangay pikuwanan nu kaLipuna a ziday, acaluway ku pacabayay a tatayna malalacal tu payunsing a pilabinan, amitupin aizaw ku "kalamkamay a pakatukuh" uyni micidekay miala patayza a kawaw. saayawan micukaymas tu sakacawan sa u lumeni'ay a kazizanng atu tuluay bihel a kazizeng, katukuh 1950 a mihcaan haymaw satu utubay tu ku sapatayza miala. amicumud tu kalamkamay a pakatukuh a kawaw, kanca amicumud tu saput a kazizeng, pabeli tu naculilan a kalisiw, mizawis tu nipasisil, u labang a miduduc tu teked nizubayan a akazizang patayza amiala a kawaw. caay ku mialay patayzaan yu pacabayay dada', kalamkamay a pakatukuh a mitupin tu Pey-tow tizaay nu muenengnay a tademaw tasasa nu buyu', mipatadu micakay tu sakauzip a tuud atu patanu tu labang pzazan tu pasaydaan. 1979 a mihcaan cin-bu palasawaden tu ku pacupiyaway zikuz, kalamkamay a pakatukuh malilid tu ku mahiniay a kawaw. katukuh 1999 a mihcaan. Yakuba patizeng tu mililiway kaput, uyza u luyaluy kalamkamay a pakatukuh kaput a kazizang kaput a tademaw mala u an-cyen misebengay mililiway a kawaw, nika zikaz ayza muliyaw ku tekeday patayza, caay ku mitupin patayza tu binawlan dada', kapah henay amipatadu pasata, caculculan‚Ä¶hatini, katukuh ayza mahiza tu ku Pey-toway a tademaw manamuh tabakiay saculilan. nakasi ťā£Ść°Ť•Ņ saayaway Pey-tow unsing nu kikawaway sakay kalipahakan Lipun atu Taywan a labang, pasazuma tulu ku maci zazanay paazih atu timulay a dadiw. 1925 a mihcaan, kilul tu tu nu lazuw a ziday, nuuzip a nipabaluhayan dengdeng a dadiw mala u angangan u sakalipahak. "nakasi" nu Lipun aimi, u milikiday muculil mudadiway a kawaw, lalekalan nu nakasi sa Taywan Pey-tow, itawyay katuud ku unsing pilabinan katud t uku sakaput a nakasi, hamin a kitizaan u unsing nakasi kaput katukuh tu lasubu kakatuud ku sakaput. caay ku dadiw dada' tawya dengdengay ku anisangaan tu dadi, iza ku maka Lipunay a dadiw liyawin aca pacumun tu nisulitan. Sadadiwan izaw ku imaciay a zaza paazih, pasumad han tu nu Amelikaay a halumika, gita a sadadiwan, sazikuza tu sa u ulugan. minakasiay a tademaw kanca a matineng tu lasubu anca malebut ku dadiw, uyni a dadiw pasu Amelika a dadiw, Lipun, Hulam, Layak hatini maydih ku labang tu dadiw hawsa, i pina a bititan amakilim kuyni a sadadiwan kya malingatu mudadiw. 1979 a mihcaan nazikuzan, kilul unsing a siwbay malawpes tu u labang paniyul tu kalaok, uyni nakasi a kawaw namakay Pey-tow tahkal tayza i cuwacuwa nu Taywan a kakitizaan malahad. 1979 OK, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

"nakasi" nu r~…ĺipun aimi, u mir~…ĺikidaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mudadiwaj a kawaw, r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu nakasi sa tajwan p…ô-tow, itawjaj katuud ku unsiŇč pir~…ĺabinan katud t uku sakaput a nakasi, ńßamin a kitizaan u unsiŇč nakasi kaput katukuńß tu r~…ĺasubu kakatuud ku sakaput. ¶aaj ku dadiw dada Ē~ ° tawja d…ôŇčd…ôŇčaj ku anisaŇčaan tu dadi, iza ku maka r~…ĺipunaj a dadiw r~…ĺijawin a ¶a pa ¶umun tu nisur~…ĺitan. sadadiwan izaw ku ima ¶iaj a zaza paazińß, pasumad ńßan tu nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a ńßar~…ĺumika, gita a sadadiwan, sazikuza tu sa u ur~…ĺugan. minakasiaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a a matin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺasubu an ¶a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku dadiw, ujni a dadiw pasu am…ôr~…ĺika a dadiw, r~…ĺipun, ńßur~…ĺam, r~…ĺajak ńßatini majdińß ku r~…ĺabaŇč tu dadiw ńßawsa, i pina a bititan amakir~…ĺim kujni a sadadiwan kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu mudadiw. **** a mińß ¶aan nazikuzan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ unsiŇč a siwbaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu u r~…ĺabaŇč panijur~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺaok, ujni nakasi a kawaw namakaj p…ô-tow tańßkar~…ĺ tajza i ¶uwa ¶uwa nu tajwan a kakitizaan mar~…ĺańßad. **** ok, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
